args.cypher:
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'HallName' AND p.value = 'Hall 4'
RETURN hall.id AS hallId, hall.idShort AS hallIdShort

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'HallName'
RETURN hall.id AS hallId, hall.idShort AS hallIdShort, p.value AS hallName

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.id AS aasId, aas.idShort AS aasIdShort

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p)
RETURN p.idShort, labels(p) AS types

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(p:MultiLanguageProperty)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN p.idShort, ls.language, ls.text

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(container:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (container)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (robotAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset)
RETURN robotAAS.id AS robotAasId, robotAAS.idShort AS robotIdShort, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN entity.idShort, entity.entityType, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, type.idShort AS typeShell, asset.globalAssetId
